theme: twenty questions against a sealed physics box
title: Twenty Questions Against a Sealed Physics Box
strategies: do-nothing baseline: never probe, predict flat zero everywhere (reproduces the evaluator's predict-zero reference)

uniform-sweep regression: spend the entire budget on a single uniform grid of probes over the queryable window, then piecewise-linearly interpolate/extrapolate; ignores the stated symmetry and never adapts, so it resolves smooth interior it didn't need and is blind on the un-probeable tail
adaptive bisection toward breakpoints: after a coarse sweep, refine probes near detected slope-kinks so each breakpoint is pinned instead of smeared

symmetry-exploiting experiment design: triangulate the hidden reflection center/offset from probed pairs, adaptively localize breakpoints, and predict the un-probeable tail by reflecting through the identified symmetry instead of extrapolating
